info.title: Spark-CRM Backend API
info.description: An AI-Powered CRM backend for digital agencies with client health scoring, proposal generators, and email drafting.

post.description: Register a new digital agency user.
OAuth2 compatible token login, retrieve access token.

delete.description: Soft delete the current user's account.

get.description: Retrieve all clients for the authenticated user, supporting filters and search.

schema.title: Response List Clients Api V1 Clients  Get

post.description: Create a new client for the agency.

get.description: Get details for a specific client.

put.description: Update details of a specific client.

post.description: Triggers an AI assessment to score the relationship health of a client based on activities.

get.description: Generates an AI summary and recommendations report for a client based on history.
List all projects for the authenticated user, optionally filtering by client or status.

schema.title: Response List Projects Api V1 Projects  Get

post.description: Create a new project for an existing client.

get.description: List all activities for the current user, optionally filtering by client, project, or type.

schema.title: Response List Activities Api V1 Activities  Get

post.description: Log a new activity. Triggers last_contact_date updates and health score recalculation.

get.description: Get detail of a logged activity by ID.

delete.description: Delete an activity. Triggers a health score update if a client is attached.

get.description: List all proposals for the authenticated user.

schema.title: Response List Proposals Api V1 Proposals  Get

post.description: AI-powered proposal generator: writes project scope, deliverables, timeline, and budget estimation.

get.description: List all email drafts for the authenticated user.

schema.title: Response List Drafts Api V1 Email Drafts  Get

post.description: AI-powered email draft creator: drafts context-aware emails for follow-ups, updates, and proposals.

get.description: Get email draft details by ID.

put.description: Update details of an email draft (such as marking as 'sent').

get.description: Retrieve aggregate usage statistics for the user's AI integrations.
Simple health check endpoint. Useful for deployment platforms.
